code:
data Bucket
  mut tokens: Int
end

fn allow(_ b: Bucket) -> Bool
  mut bb = b
  if bb.tokens >= 1
    bb.tokens = bb.tokens - 1
    true
  else
    false
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let b = Bucket(tokens: 3)
  mut i = 0
  while i < 5
    if allow(b)
      println("ALLOW")
    else
      println("DENY")
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
end
